PS_DDR_CTRL.name: PS_DDR_CTRL
PS_DDR_CTRL.template:
// PS DDR Memory Controller: DDR4 address, data, strobe, control
PS_DDR_CTRL_inst (
  // Address / command
  .PS_DDR_A(ddr_a),                 // out[17:0]: address bus
  .PS_DDR_BA(ddr_ba),               // out[1:0]: bank address
  .PS_DDR_BG(ddr_bg),               // out: bank group
  .PS_DDR_ACT_N(ddr_act_n),         // out: activate command (active low)
  .PS_DDR_CAS_N(ddr_cas_n),         // out: CAS (active low)
  .PS_DDR_RAS_N(ddr_ras_n),         // out: RAS (active low)
  .PS_DDR_WE_N(ddr_we_n),           // out: write enable (active low)
  .PS_DDR_CS(ddr_cs),               // out[1:0]: chip select
  // Clock / strobe
  .PS_DDR_CK(ddr_ck),               // out: DDR clock
  .PS_DDR_CK_N(ddr_ck_n),           // out: DDR clock (inverted)
  .PS_DDR_CKE(ddr_cke),             // out: clock enable
  .PS_DDR_DQS_P(ddr_dqs_p),         // inout[8:0]: DQ strobe (positive)
  .PS_DDR_DQS_N(ddr_dqs_n),         // inout[8:0]: DQ strobe (negative)
  .PS_DDR_DQ(ddr_dq),               // inout[71:0]: data bus
  .PS_DDR_DM(ddr_dm),               // out[8:0]: data mask
  // ODT / control
  .PS_DDR_ODT(ddr_odt),             // out: on-die termination
  .PS_DDR_ALERT_N(ddr_alert_n),    // in: alert (active low)
  .PS_DDR_PARITY(ddr_parity),       // out: parity bit
  .PS_DDR_RAM_RST_N(ddr_ram_rst_n), // out: RAM reset (active low)
  .PS_DDR_ZQ(ddr_zq)                // inout: impedance calibration
);

PS_DP_CTRL.name: PS_DP_CTRL
PS_DP_CTRL.template:
// PS DisplayPort Controller: video input, audio I/O, video output
PS_DP_CTRL_inst (
  // Live video input (from PL)
  .dp_live_video_in_clk(dp_live_video_in_clk),      // in: pixel clock
  .dp_live_video_pixel1_in(dp_live_video_pixel1_in), // in[35:0]: pixel data
  .dp_live_video_hsync_in(dp_live_video_hsync_in),   // in: horizontal sync
  .dp_live_video_vsync_in(dp_live_video_vsync_in),   // in: vertical sync
  .dp_live_video_de_in(dp_live_video_de_in),         // in: data enable
  // Graphics layer
  .dp_live_gfx_pixel1_in(dp_live_gfx_pixel1_in),     // in[35:0]: graphics pixels
  .dp_live_gfx_alpha_in(dp_live_gfx_alpha_in),       // in[7:0]: alpha blending
  // Audio input (from PL)
  .dp_s_axis_live_audio_aclk(dp_s_axis_live_audio_aclk),       // in: audio clock
  .dp_s_axis_live_audio_tdata_in(dp_s_axis_live_audio_tdata_in), // in[31:0]: audio data
  .dp_s_axis_live_audio_tid_in(dp_s_axis_live_audio_tid_in),     // in: stream ID
  .dp_s_axis_live_audio_tvalid_in(dp_s_axis_live_audio_tvalid_in), // in: valid
  .dp_s_axis_live_audio_tready_in(dp_s_axis_live_audio_tready_in), // out: ready
  // Audio output (to PL)
  .dp_m_axis_mixed_audio_tdata_out(dp_m_axis_mixed_audio_tdata_out), // out[31:0]: audio data
  .dp_m_axis_mixed_audio_tid_out(dp_m_axis_mixed_audio_tid_out),     // out: stream ID
  .dp_m_axis_mixed_audio_tvalid_out(dp_m_axis_mixed_audio_tvalid_out), // out: valid
  // Video output (to external DP transceiver)
  .dp_video_pixel1_out(dp_video_pixel1_out),         // out[35:0]: output pixel
  .dp_video_hsync_out(dp_video_hsync_out),           // out: horizontal sync
  .dp_video_vsync_out(dp_video_vsync_out),           // out: vertical sync
  .dp_video_vid_de_out(dp_video_vid_de_out)          // out: data enable
);

PS_AXI_MASTER.name: PS_AXI_MASTER
PS_AXI_MASTER.template:
// PS AXI Master Port: M_AXI_HPM (ACP, HPM0, HPM1, etc.)
// Connects PS fabric -> PL slave interface
PS_AXI_MASTER_inst (
  // Write address
  .m_axi_awaddr(m_axi_awaddr),       // out[C_M_AXI_ADDR_WIDTH-1:0]
  .m_axi_awburst(m_axi_awburst),     // out[1:0]: INCR, FIXED, WRAP
  .m_axi_awcache(m_axi_awcache),     // out[3:0]: cache policy
  .m_axi_awlen(m_axi_awlen),         // out[7:0]: burst length
  .m_axi_awlock(m_axi_awlock),       // out: atomic access
  .m_axi_awprot(m_axi_awprot),       // out[2:0]: protection type
  .m_axi_awsize(m_axi_awsize),       // out[2:0]: burst size (2^N bytes)
  .m_axi_awvalid(m_axi_awvalid),     // out: address valid
  .m_axi_awready(m_axi_awready),     // in: slave ready
  // Write data
  .m_axi_wdata(m_axi_wdata),         // out[C_M_AXI_DATA_WIDTH-1:0]
  .m_axi_wlast(m_axi_wlast),         // out: last beat
  .m_axi_wstrb(m_axi_wstrb),         // out[C_M_AXI_DATA_WIDTH/8-1:0]
  .m_axi_wvalid(m_axi_wvalid),       // out: data valid
  .m_axi_wready(m_axi_wready),       // in: slave ready
  // Write response
  .m_axi_bresp(m_axi_bresp),         // in[1:0]: OKAY, EXOKAY, SLVERR, DECERR
  .m_axi_bvalid(m_axi_bvalid),       // in: response valid
  .m_axi_bready(m_axi_bready),       // out: ready for response
  // Read address
  .m_axi_araddr(m_axi_araddr),       // out[C_M_AXI_ADDR_WIDTH-1:0]
  .m_axi_arburst(m_axi_arburst),     // out[1:0]
  .m_axi_arcache(m_axi_arcache),     // out[3:0]
  .m_axi_arlen(m_axi_arlen),         // out[7:0]
  .m_axi_arlock(m_axi_arlock),       // out
  .m_axi_arprot(m_axi_arprot),       // out[2:0]
  .m_axi_arsize(m_axi_arsize),       // out[2:0]
  .m_axi_arvalid(m_axi_arvalid),     // out: address valid
  .m_axi_arready(m_axi_arready),     // in: slave ready
  // Read data
  .m_axi_rdata(m_axi_rdata),         // in[C_M_AXI_DATA_WIDTH-1:0]
  .m_axi_rlast(m_axi_rlast),         // in: last beat
  .m_axi_rresp(m_axi_rresp),         // in[1:0]
  .m_axi_rvalid(m_axi_rvalid),       // in: data valid
  .m_axi_rready(m_axi_rready)        // out: ready for data
);
PS_AXI_MASTER.port_src: UG1085 (Zynq US+ TRM) — PS Block Definitions
